sections.paragraph:
fut. יִשְׂנָא inf. abs. שָׂנֹא, constr. שְׂנֹא and שְׂנֹאת (Syr. ܣܢܐܳ, Arab. شَنَأَ) to hate, whether persons, Psa 5:6 31:7 Deu 22:13 2Sa 13:15, 22 2Sa 13:22or things, Isa 1:14 Psa 11:5 Pro 1:22. Part. שֹׂונֵא subst. a hater, an enemy, Psa 35:19 38:20 with suff. שׂנְאֹו one who hates him, Deu 7:10 also שׂנֵא לֹו Deu 4:42 19:4 , Deu 19:6, 11 Deu 19:11 Jos 20:5. Fem. plur. שׂנְאֹות female enemies, Eze 16:27.

Niphal, pass. Pro 14:17.

Piel, part. מְשַׂנֵּא hater, enemy, Psa 18:41 55:13 68:2 , etc.

Derivatives, שָׂנִיא, שְׂנֵאָה.
